name: Oatmeal Sunflower Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine water, apple juice, honey, salt, and yeast.
3. Add sunflower seeds, oats, gluten flour, and whole-wheat flour to the wet ingredients.
4. Mix until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased bread pan and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
7. Remove from oven and let cool before slicing.
